creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
We at portmgr pondered this patch, and we can live with it as submitted.
We prefer neutral variable name, like forex. PROJECTHOST, over the
proposed GOOGLEHOST. Submitter should commit.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Geography is only physics slowed down, with a few trees stuck on it...
  -- Terry Pratchett
